name: HP Inc.
description: HP Inc. is a leading global provider of personal computing and other access devices, imaging and printing products, and related technologies, solutions, and services. The company operates through two primary segments: Personal Systems, which includes commercial and consumer desktop and notebook PCs, workstations, thin clients, and retail point-of-sale systems; and Printing, which provides consumer and commercial printer hardware, supplies, media, and scanning devices. HP Inc. serves individual consumers, small- and medium-sized businesses, and large enterprises worldwide.
